Study results and measurements: Relative risk 0.2 (CI 95% 0.08 -0.49) Based on data from 334 participants in 3 studies. (Randomized controlled)
Intervention Dihydroartemisinin + pipera: 70 per 1000 280 fewer per 1000 ( CI 95% 322 fewer- 178 fewer )
